achievements.title: Safed Iccus
achievements.description: Finish the game in one session on normal or higher difficulity (Level select disabled)
achievements.author: Traysir89

achievements.title: Banished the Mutants
achievements.description: Finish the game in one session on hard or higher difficulity (Level select disabled)

achievements.title: Prepared for the Worst
achievements.description: Finish the game in one session on hyper difficulity (Level select disabled)

achievements.title: Wor against the Mutants of Iccus
achievements.description: Finish the game in one session without using a continue on normal or higher difficulity [Start with 3 life]  (Level select disabled)
achievements.author: Traysir89

achievements.title: Cave Secret
achievements.description: Find the hidden 1-Up in Stage 1
achievements.author: Traysir89

achievements.title: Sea Secret
achievements.description: Find the hidden 1-Up in Stage 2
achievements.author: Traysir89

achievements.title: Factory Secrets
achievements.description: Find both hidden 1-Ups in Stage 4 in one session

achievements.title: Maximum Range
achievements.description: Collect enough blue orbs to reach the maximum range with your shot

achievements.title: Maximum Strength
achievements.description: Collect enough red orbs to reach the maximum strength with your shot

achievements.title: Maximum Velocity
achievements.description: Collect enough feather to reach the maximum speed of your movement

achievements.title: Magican Assortment
achievements.description: Collect every shot variation and use every spell in one session
